blocks.content:
In this milestone, you navigate to the Manage tab in Instrumentation Hub. This is where you view instrumented services and modify their settings.

If you completed the first learning path, you should see at least one namespace with instrumented services.
Sign in to your Grafana Cloud environment, for example `mystack.grafana.net`.
Verify you see your instrumented namespaces and services listed.
In the next milestone, you'll open the settings for a namespace.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [Application namespace settings](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/get-started/inst-hub-setup/#application-namespace-settings)
